evals.prompt: Generate Document 2 (Operator Manual) for customer 'PT Example Manufacturing'. Use all screenshots from docs/FAT_SAT/Operation_Manual/. Save to docs/FAT_SAT/deliverables/02_Operator_Manual.docx
expectations: Output file exists at docs/FAT_SAT/deliverables/02_Operator_Manual.docx
Document contains cover page with customer name 'PT Example Manufacturing'
Document embeds Login_Page.png screenshot
Document embeds Live Inspection screenshots (at least 4 from 7_Live_Inspection/)
Document uses GOOD/NG terminology, never APPROVE/REJECT
All images have figure captions
Section 4 (Live Inspection) is the most detailed section
Document includes keyboard shortcuts appendix

evals.prompt: Generate Document 5 (FAT Report) for customer 'PT Example Manufacturing', machine serial 'INDUSIA-2026-001'. Include all test cases from SKILL.md outline. Save to docs/FAT_SAT/deliverables/05_FAT_Report.docx
expectations: Output file exists at docs/FAT_SAT/deliverables/05_FAT_Report.docx
Document has cover page with machine serial number
Test IDs follow FAT-XXX format sequentially
Each test has: ID, Description, Expected Result, Actual Result (blank), PASS/FAIL (blank)
Test categories cover: Power-On, Hardware, Auth, Master Data, Work Order, Live Inspection, Management, Cloud Sync, Safety
Sign-off table has roles for both INDUSIA and Customer representatives
Test summary table counts total tests per category
Non-conformance report section is present but empty (template)

evals.prompt: Generate Document 1 (System Architecture Guide) for customer 'PT Example Manufacturing'. Reference docs/API_AI_BACKEND.md for API details and docs/DATABASE_SCHEMA.md for schema info. Save to docs/FAT_SAT/deliverables/01_System_Architecture_Guide.docx
expectations: Output file exists
Contains architecture diagram description (factory floor vs office network)
Describes SSE communication between AI Backend and UI
Lists all ports: 3000 (Next.js), 3001 (PostgREST), 5432 (PostgreSQL), 8001 (AI Backend)
Includes database ownership matrix (UI vs AI Backend)
Security section mentions 47 penetration test fixes
Glossary section defines AOI, PCB, HMI, SSE, PLC, RBAC

evals.prompt: Generate Document 4 (Troubleshooting Guide). Include the quick reference symptom table with at least 15 common issues. Save to docs/FAT_SAT/deliverables/04_Troubleshooting_Guide.docx
expectations: Output file exists
Quick reference symptom table has at least 15 rows
Each row has: Symptom, Possible Cause, Solution, Severity
Covers hardware issues (camera, PLC, pneumatic)
Covers software issues (HMI, login, SSE, database)
Covers AI issues (high false call rate, low confidence)
Covers network/sync issues
Has escalation procedure section

evals.prompt: Generate Document 2 (Operator Manual) Section 4 (Live Inspection) only. Focus on the GOOD/NG decision workflow.
expectations: Uses 'GOOD' not 'APPROVE' for pass action
Uses 'NG' not 'REJECT' for fail action
Never uses the term 'FALSE CALL' as a button label
Explains false call as automatic detection when operator disagrees with AI
Mentions keyboard shortcuts G and N
References ISA-101 button sizing (30mm minimum)
